prompt: /update-project --project test-project --session-summary "Started using CASTEP today for geometry optimisations. Used GGA-PBE functional, 830 eV plane-wave cutoff, 1x1x1 k-grid, norm-conserving pseudopotentials, no dispersion correction. This is the main DFT setup going forward."

assertions.text: methods.md contains a new table row with CASTEP, GGA-PBE, 830 eV cutoff
Methods row includes k-grid (1x1x1) and pseudopotential type (norm-conserving)
Existing methods table rows are not duplicated
